## ExtractMutations type

Extracts the mutations type from a XStoreModule.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type ExtractMutations<Module extends AnyXModule> = Module extends XModule<XStoreModule<any, any, infer Mutations, any>> ? Mutations : never;
```
